name: uridine monophosphate (UMP)
mechanism: Uridine-source nucleotide supporting pyrimidine salvage and membrane phosphatide synthesis; cognition-related framing usually centers on phospholipid synapse-support biology rather than direct neurotransmitter receptor activity.
contraindications: well-established clinical drug interactions retained for this pass.
summary: Uridine-source nucleotide supporting pyrimidine salvage and membrane phosphatide synthesis; cognition-related framing usually centers on phospholipid synapse-support biology rather than direct neurotransmitter receptor activity.
